Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 4 -1 0 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 4 25 25}Is this... an emergency!? A serious emergency!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}So the world's coming to an end, huh? I think I remember some other cult saying stuff like that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}Except they really weren't about "initiation fees." It was more about giving up material wealth, wasn't it?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}Stealing ideas from real, actual religions... That's a textbook cult tactic, you know.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}Oh yeah, you've been duped, kid.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}But not by us. You should blame that cult you believe in so much.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}Now that I know the truth, I almost feel sorry for you. But you had to take things too far.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}Try not to hit his face. If you leave any marks, he might be able to press charges.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 60 -1 0 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 10 25 25}B-But if I die here... I'll be reborn, and I can go to Paradise![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 4 -1 0 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 4 25 25}Wh-What are you doing here? After I said such awful things to you... That we were through...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_4_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 60 -1 0 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 10 25 25}I-I'm freaking out! *sob* I don't want them to hurt me![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Suemitsu really trusts me with all his heart.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like our relationship is stronger...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}{f 5 21 0 3}Gross, dude! You're getting snot everywhere![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 5 21 0 3}Screw this. I gotta get to work.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}I've had just about enough of this.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}Look, just forget about the money. But I don't ever want to see you near my son again.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 60 -1 0 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 10 25 25}You're so wonderful, {f 4 2}-kun... You have such a kind soul![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I took Suemitsu home and[n]went back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
